title: Create the workspace and relocate bastion into crates/bastion/
description:
Build the workspace container and move the package with history preserved:
- `git mv src crates/bastion/src` so the entire source tree (including its `manifests/` and `fixtures/` assets) relocates with git history intact; confirm no `src/` remains at repo root.
- Author `crates/bastion/Cargo.toml` from the current root manifest: carry over `[package]` (name `bastion`, version, `edition = "2024"`), the full `[dependencies]` set, and `[dev-dependencies]` (`tempfile`). Repoint the four sibling path deps to the new depth (two extra `../`): `bella-engine = { path = "../../../bella/crates/bella-engine" }` and the three `workflow-engine-*` at `../../../../portfolio/workflow-engine-rs/crates/…`. Do NOT add `default-features = false` to `bella-engine` (CLAUDE.md rule 7).
- Replace the root `Cargo.toml` with a virtual workspace manifest: `[workspace]`, `members = ["crates/bastion"]`, and `resolver = "3"` (edition-2024-compatible). It must no longer declare the `bastion` `[package]` or its dependencies.
- Do not move any behavior into new crates — this block only builds the container (out of scope per the block).

title: Restore a green build and test suite after the relocation
description:
Prove the moved workspace builds and that no test regressed, and repair any residual breakage the relocation introduced:
- Regenerate `Cargo.lock` (workspace-root lockfile) and run the full gate.
- Fix any breakage caused specifically by the move: path-dep depth errors, workspace `resolver` warnings, and any hardcoded root-relative path in tests. In particular re-verify the `CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR`-relative fixture joins in `crates/bastion/src/validate/report.rs` and `crates/bastion/src/brain/code_graph.rs` (they join `src/…` off the manifest dir, which is now `crates/bastion` — should still resolve since fixtures moved with the tree; adjust only if a path assumed the old repo root).
- Confirm `include_str!`/`include_bytes!` fixture loads (detect/db/brain golden tests) still compile and pass unchanged.
- The `bastion` binary and the entire pre-existing test suite must pass with the same tests, all green — no new tests are expected since no behavior changed.

title: Reflect the new layout in repo docs
description:
Update in-repo references that name the old `src/…` layout so they point at `crates/bastion/src/…`:
- `CLAUDE.md` → the `## Directory map` fenced tree (`src/main.rs`, `src/cli.rs`, the `src/<module>/` rows) — rewrite to the `crates/bastion/src/…` layout and add the top-level `crates/bastion/` container.
- `AGENT.md` and `GEMINI.md` → apply the same fix only where they mirror the directory map or reference `src/…` paths; leave unrelated content untouched.
- This is documentation-only and disjoint from the source/manifest changes; it must not alter build behavior.

title: Validate
description: Run the Validation Commands listed in tasks.md and confirm all pass: `cargo fmt --check`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo test`, `cargo build --release`, `cargo run -- --help`.
